mechanism_narrative: Declines in the federal funds rate directly lower corporate borrowing costs and equity discount rates, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: SPX 20-day forward returns show negative mean returns during rate cut periods, or Rank IC falls below 0.02 over rolling 3-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: When the unemployment rate exceeds 8.0%, severe labor market deterioration triggers recessionary expectations that compress corporate earnings forecasts and drive negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Forward 60-day returns remain positive in over 55% of instances where UNRATE crosses 8.0%, or the signal loses statistical significance in out-of-sample testing.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous declines in retail sales and housing starts indicate a synchronized collapse in consumer demand and construction activity, which forces equity valuations lower over the next month.
failure_condition: The joint decline in RSAFS and HOUST fails to predict negative 20-day returns, with a positive Sharpe ratio observed in triggered windows over a 5-year backtest.

mechanism_narrative: Sharp month-over-month contractions in industrial production signal immediate supply chain bottlenecks and inventory drawdowns that trigger short-term equity sell-offs within the next week.
failure_condition: INDPRO contractions during late-cycle expansions produce positive 5-day forward returns in more than 60% of cases, invalidating the short-term drawdown mechanism.

mechanism_narrative: Quarterly growth in real GDP reflects underlying economic expansion that supports corporate profit margins, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: GDPC1 growth rates show zero or negative correlation with 60-day forward returns across multiple business cycles, with Rank IC consistently below 0.01.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating consumer price inflation above 0.5% monthly forces markets to price in aggressive central bank tightening, which compresses equity multiples and produces negative forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: CPIAUCSL spikes above 0.5% monthly are followed by positive 20-day returns in over 65% of historical instances, or the signal exhibits negative predictive power in walk-forward tests.

mechanism_narrative: Rising nonfarm payrolls combined with a falling federal funds rate indicates an accommodative monetary policy successfully stimulating labor demand, which drives positive equity returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: The combination of rising PAYEMS and falling FEDFUNDS fails to generate positive 60-day returns, with mean forward returns statistically indistinguishable from zero over a 10-year sample.

mechanism_narrative: During periods of elevated unemployment, weak retail sales data confirms deteriorating consumer spending power, triggering immediate risk-off positioning and negative S&P 500 returns over the next week.
failure_condition: RSAFS declines during high-unemployment regimes produce positive 5-day forward returns in over 50% of cases, or the mechanism shows no statistical edge in out-of-sample validation.
